name: IdsEdwMbrCobDLoad

text.value: WITH SRC AS (SELECT * FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.Z99_TMP_IdsEdwMbrCobDLoad) UPDATE T SET T.SRC_SYS_CD=S.SRC_SYS_CD, T.MBR_UNIQ_KEY=S.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, T.MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_CD=S.MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_CD, T.MBR_COB_TYP_CD=S.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, T.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK=S.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK=S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, T.MBR_SK=S.MBR_SK, T.ACTV_COB_IN=S.ACTV_COB_IN, T.MCARE_PRI_IN=S.MCARE_PRI_IN, T.MBR_COB_LACK_COB_INFO_STRT_DT=S.MBR_COB_LACK_COB_INFO_STRT_DT, T.MBR_COB_LAST_VER_METH_CD=S.MBR_COB_LAST_VER_METH_CD, T.MBR_COB_LAST_VER_METH_NM=S.MBR_COB_LAST_VER_METH_NM, T.MBR_COB_LAST_VERIFIER_TX=S.MBR_COB_LAST_VERIFIER_TX, T.MBR_COB_LTR_TRGR_DT_SK=S.MBR_COB_LTR_TRGR_DT_SK, T.MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_ID_CD=S.MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_ID_CD, T.MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_ID_NM=S.MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_ID_NM, T.MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_POL_ID=S.MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_POL_ID, T.MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_NM=S.MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_NM, T.MBR_COB_TERM_RSN_CD=S.MBR_COB_TERM_RSN_CD, T.MBR_COB_TERM_RSN_NM=S.MBR_COB_TERM_RSN_NM, T.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK=S.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, T.MBR_COB_TYP_NM=S.MBR_COB_TYP_NM, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.MBR_COB_LAST_VER_METH_CD_SK=S.MBR_COB_LAST_VER_METH_CD_SK, T.MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_ID_CD_SK=S.MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_ID_CD_SK, T.MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_CD_SK=S.MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_CD_SK, T.MBR_COB_TERM_RSN_CD_SK=S.MBR_COB_TERM_RSN_CD_SK, T.MBR_COB_TYP_CD_SK=S.MBR_COB_TYP_CD_SK, T.MBR_COB_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_TYP_CD=S.MBR_COB_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_TYP_CD, T.MBR_COB_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_TYP_NM=S.MBR_COB_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_TYP_NM, T.MBR_COB_RX_DRUG_COV_TYP_CD=S.MBR_COB_RX_DRUG_COV_TYP_CD, T.MBR_COB_RX_DRUG_COV_TYP_NM=S.MBR_COB_RX_DRUG_COV_TYP_NM, T.MBR_COB_SUPLMT_DRUG_TYP_CD=S.MBR_COB_SUPLMT_DRUG_TYP_CD, T.MBR_COB_SUPLMT_DRUG_TYP_NM=S.MBR_COB_SUPLMT_DRUG_TYP_NM, T.RX_BIN_ID=S.RX_BIN_ID, T.RX_PCN_ID=S.RX_PCN_ID, T.RX_GRP_ID=S.RX_GRP_ID, T.RX_MBR_ID=S.RX_MBR_ID, T.MBR_COB_PRI_INSUR_LAST_NM=S.MBR_COB_PRI_INSUR_LAST_NM, T.MBR_COB_PRI_INSUR_FIRST_NM=S.MBR_COB_PRI_INSUR_FIRST_NM, T.MBR_COB_PRI_INSUR_ID=S.MBR_COB_PRI_INSUR_ID, T.MBR_COB_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_TYP_CD_SK=S.MBR_COB_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_TYP_CD_SK, T.MBR_COB_RX_DRUG_COV_TYP_CD_SK=S.MBR_COB_RX_DRUG_COV_TYP_CD_SK, T.MBR_COB_SUPLMT_DRUG_TYP_CD_SK=S.MBR_COB_SUPLMT_DRUG_TYP_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_COB_D T JOIN SRC S ON T.MBR_COB_SK = S.MBR_COB_SK; INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_COB_D (MBR_COB_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_CD, MBR_COB_TYP_CD, MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, MBR_SK, ACTV_COB_IN, MCARE_PRI_IN, MBR_COB_LACK_COB_INFO_STRT_DT, MBR_COB_LAST_VER_METH_CD, MBR_COB_LAST_VER_METH_NM, MBR_COB_LAST_VERIFIER_TX, MBR_COB_LTR_TRGR_DT_SK, MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_ID_CD, MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_ID_NM, MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_POL_ID, MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_NM, MBR_COB_TERM_RSN_CD, MBR_COB_TERM_RSN_NM, MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, MBR_COB_TYP_NM, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_COB_LAST_VER_METH_CD_SK, MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_ID_CD_SK, MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_CD_SK, MBR_COB_TERM_RSN_CD_SK, MBR_COB_TYP_CD_SK, MBR_COB_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_TYP_CD, MBR_COB_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_TYP_NM, MBR_COB_RX_DRUG_COV_TYP_CD, MBR_COB_RX_DRUG_COV_TYP_NM, MBR_COB_SUPLMT_DRUG_TYP_CD, MBR_COB_SUPLMT_DRUG_TYP_NM, RX_BIN_ID, RX_PCN_ID, RX_GRP_ID, RX_MBR_ID, MBR_COB_PRI_INSUR_LAST_NM, MBR_COB_PRI_INSUR_FIRST_NM, MBR_COB_PRI_INSUR_ID, MBR_COB_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_TYP_CD_SK, MBR_COB_RX_DRUG_COV_TYP_CD_SK, MBR_COB_SUPLMT_DRUG_TYP_CD_SK) SELECT S.MBR_COB_SK, S.SRC_SYS_CD, S.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, S.MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_CD, S.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, S.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, S.MBR_SK, S.ACTV_COB_IN, S.MCARE_PRI_IN, S.MBR_COB_LACK_COB_INFO_STRT_DT, S.MBR_COB_LAST_VER_METH_CD, S.MBR_COB_LAST_VER_METH_NM, S.MBR_COB_LAST_VERIFIER_TX, S.MBR_COB_LTR_TRGR_DT_SK, S.MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_ID_CD, S.MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_ID_NM, S.MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_POL_ID, S.MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_NM, S.MBR_COB_TERM_RSN_CD, S.MBR_COB_TERM_RSN_NM, S.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, S.MBR_COB_TYP_NM, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.MBR_COB_LAST_VER_METH_CD_SK, S.MBR_COB_OTHR_CAR_ID_CD_SK, S.MBR_COB_PAYMT_PRTY_CD_SK, S.MBR_COB_TERM_RSN_CD_SK, S.MBR_COB_TYP_CD_SK, S.MBR_COB_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_TYP_CD, S.MBR_COB_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_TYP_NM, S.MBR_COB_RX_DRUG_COV_TYP_CD, S.MBR_COB_RX_DRUG_COV_TYP_NM, S.MBR_COB_SUPLMT_DRUG_TYP_CD, S.MBR_COB_SUPLMT_DRUG_TYP_NM, S.RX_BIN_ID, S.RX_PCN_ID, S.RX_GRP_ID, S.RX_MBR_ID, S.MBR_COB_PRI_INSUR_LAST_NM, S.MBR_COB_PRI_INSUR_FIRST_NM, S.MBR_COB_PRI_INSUR_ID, S.MBR_COB_MCARE_SEC_PAYER_TYP_CD_SK, S.MBR_COB_RX_DRUG_COV_TYP_CD_SK, S.MBR_COB_SUPLMT_DRUG_TYP_CD_SK FROM SRC S LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_COB_D T ON T.MBR_COB_SK=S.MBR_COB_SK WHERE T.MBR_COB_SK IS NULL
